description_long: This is a pair of low-top sneakers featuring a vibrant, tropical-themed print with palm leaves and flowers in shades of pink, orange, blue, and green. The shoes have white rubber soles and white laces, with a visible text detail reading 'BAD YEAR' on the outer side of the sole. The upper material appears to be canvas, and the shoes have a classic skate-shoe silhouette with reinforced stitching around the toe and heel. The tongue and collar are lightly padded for comfort, and the interior is lined with a soft fabric. The overall design is eye-catching and casual, suitable for urban environments and streetwear fashion.
description: A pair of low-top sneakers with a colorful tropical print, white soles, and laces, featuring 'BAD YEAR' text on the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, white laces, and the vibrant tropical print on the upper.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the 'BAD YEAR' text on the sole, the full tropical pattern, and the shoe's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel area, padded collar, and continuation of the tropical print.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the shoe's profile, lacing, and the colorful pattern without the text detail.
